betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Tree beacon too slow to supply your coke ovens? Consider using the wood from a farming station to craft axes and hoes, and feeding them back into the farming station(s). This is MUCH faster than the tree beacon, and even a relatively simple one ought to provide enough wood until mid-late game, depending on if and how fast you process charcoal byproducts.

This pack has native EU->RF conversion, meaning you can power your RF machines with gregtech energy.
